docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAR-05-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MARCH-05-2009 BY PRO TEM JUDGE ELLIOTT A. MYLES (D-525).

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF MAR-05-2009 - JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF RESPONDENT DEE MC CULLAGH AND AGAINST APPELLANT SUSAN HAYES IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,450.00 PRINCIPAL, $0.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $245.00 COSTS, FOR A TOTAL OF $2,695.00. THE CASE IS REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.780(D). PRO TEM JUDGE ELLIOTT A. MYLES; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-525).

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-05-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR THURS., MAR-05-2009: RESPONDENT DEE MC CULLAGH PRESENT; THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR APPELLANT SUSAN HAYS THIS DAY. THE CLERK ADMINISTERS THE OATH TO MS. MCCULLAGH, WHO ALSO SIGNS STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM, WHICH IS FILED.

THIS CAUSE COMES ON THIS DAY FOR TRIAL DE NOVO IN DEPARTMENT 525, WITH THE COURT AND COURTROOM PERSONNEL PRESENT.

RESPONDENT DEE MC CULLAGH PRESENTS ORAL TESTIMONY TO THE COURT REGARDING THE CAUSE; THE COURT HEARS BOTH ORAL EVIDENCE AND READS AND REVIEWS DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED DURING THE PRESENTATION OF TRIAL DE NOVO.

9:45 A.M.: AFTER HEARING ALL ORAL EVIDENCE PRESENTED AND REVIEWING THE DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE,
THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.

JPT ELLIOTT A. MYLES; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-525)

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-26-2008 Granted Per Written Order

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-26-2008 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-24-2008 Judgment Entered
